title: run-reviewer-team-non-interactive input
description: Input envelope for the run-reviewer-team-non-interactive helper skill. Mode detection: when `prior_handoff_outputs_path` is empty or absent, the skill runs in dispatch mode (writes prompt files, emits state_updates.handoffs). When the field is a non-empty absolute path, the skill runs in triage mode (reads the sidecar JSON the orchestrator wrote with each sub-agent's stdout/exit_code, triages findings, returns the final envelope).

prior_handoff_outputs_path.description: Absolute path to the JSON sidecar carrying the dispatched sub-agent outputs the orchestrator just collected. Empty string (or absent) on the first invocation (dispatch mode); non-empty on the re-invocation that follows a `waiting_for_handoffs` envelope, signaling triage mode. Sidecar shape: an array of `{ index, exit_code, output, stderr }` entries, one per dispatched handoff.
